description_long: This is a large, multi-story stone house with a steep gable roof and several dormer windows, surrounded by a well-maintained garden and mature trees. The front facade features symmetrical window placement, a central entryway with a small porch, and a paved patio area with outdoor furniture. The rear of the house opens onto a landscaped backyard with additional seating, a small pond, and decorative flower beds. The side view reveals a garage structure attached to the house, as well as more garden space and pathways. The roof is predominantly gray with multiple slopes and skylights, adding architectural interest. The property is enclosed by low fencing and lush greenery, creating a private and inviting residential environment.
description: A large, stone-clad multi-story house with a steep gable roof, symmetrical windows, attached garage, and landscaped gardens with mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, patio area, and two large trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage, side windows, and additional garden space with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a pond, outdoor seating, flower beds, and more trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the garden, pond, and side entrance, with visible roof slopes and skylights.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a small porch, single door, steps, and flanking windows
